name: Mirae Asset Daewoo Co., Ltd. INVERSE MEDIA ENT CORE5 ETN 15
summary: Mirae Asset Daewoo Co., Ltd. INVERSE MEDIA ENT CORE5 ETN 15 is an Exchange Traded Note (ETN) managed by Mirae Asset Daewoo Co., Ltd, providing inverse exposure to a basket of five core media and entertainment companies in South Korea. This ETN is designed to increase in value when the media and entertainment sector declines. It is listed on the Korea Exchange.
